title: Add --cidfile option to from
body:
Add --cidfile option which specifiles the file to write the container, when create a conatiner.

Signed-off-by: Zhou Hao <zhouhao@cn.fujitsu.com>

comments.body: You are missing a change to command completions.

> You are missing a change to command completions.

I think everything that needs to be modified has been changed. I don't know which side you said needs to be modified.
LGTM, one small test suggestion for some later time.  Thanks @q384566678!
